zh.lifeSummary: 當Lord Sir John Thomas Perrot於1528年11月11日出生在威爾士布洛可爾哈維福德維斯特時，他的父親Thomas Perrot28歲，母親Lady Mary Anne Berkeley25歲。他於1553年之前與Anne Cheyne結婚。他們至少是3個兒子的父母。他去世於1592年11月3日在英國米德萊可堂爾 本 倫敦享年63歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭倫敦堂爾 哈姆勒次。

nameMeanings.name: Perrot
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Emile, Gilles, Veronique.
French: from a pet form of the Old French personal name Perre, a variant of Pierre , French form of Peter . Compare Perrotte .
Breton: from a French-influenced pet form (see 1 above) of the personal name Per, Breton form of Peter . Compare Perro .

variants.name: Pierre
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Andre, Jacques, Antoine, Yves, Michel, Jean Claude, Mireille, Jean Robert, Francois, Monique, Raoul, Serge.
French, Walloon, West Indian (mainly Haiti), and Mauritian:

from the personal name Pierre, French form of Peter (see also below). This is one of the most frequent surnames in Haiti (along with Jean and Joseph ) and in Saint Martin. It is also established elsewhere in the West Indies (e.g. in Trinidad and Tobago, Saint Lucia, Grenada, and Bahamas).

variants.name: Perrotte
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Damien, Henri.
Altered form of French Perrot or Perrault , reflecting the Canadian and American French practice of sounding the final -t.
French: from the feminine form of   Perrot  .

nameMeanings.name: Sir
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Short form of Simon , now rare, but more common in the Middle Ages, when it gave rise to the surnames Simms and Simpson.

variants.name: Simon
meanings: Usual English form of Simeon , borne in the New Testament by various characters: two apostles, a brother of Jesus, a Pharisee, a leper, a tanner, a sorcerer (who offered money for the gifts of the Holy Ghost, giving rise to the term simony), and the man who carried Jesus's cross to the Crucifixion.

nameMeanings.name: John
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: form of   John  , also used quite frequently in the English-speaking world. In Northern Ireland it is sometimes found as a variant of   Ewan .

nameMeanings.name: Thomas
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: New Testament name, borne by one of Christ's twelve apostles, referred to as ‘Thomas, called Didymus’ (John 11:16; 20:24). Didymos is the Greek word for ‘twin’, and the name is the Greek form of an Aramaic byname meaning ‘twin’. The given name has always been popular throughout Christendom, in part because St Thomas's doubts have made him seem a very human character.

historicEvents.title: Book of Common Prayer
historicEvents.description: Book of Common Prayer, a product of the English Reformation, was published in 1549 for assistance in the administration of the sacraments and other rites and ceremonies of the church according to the use of the Church of England. The book outlined morning, evening, and communion prayers and orders for baptism and marriage, thus making England a truly Protestant state.

historicEvents.title: Act of Uniformity
historicEvents.description: The Act of Uniformity was passed by the Parliament of England and required all people to go to church once a week. The consequence of not attending church was a fine of 12 pence, which was a considerable amount for a poor person.

historicEvents.title: State Lottery
historicEvents.description: A State Lottery was recorded in 1569. The tickets were sold at St. Paul's Cathedral in London.

historicEvents.title: The Royal Exchange is Organized
historicEvents.description: The Royal Exchange was organized in January 1571 by Sir Thomas Gresham. Gresham is known as the father of English banking.

historicEvents.title: The First English Colony is Established in America
historicEvents.description: England established its first colony in North America in 1585 as a way to generate additional wealth. The colony was named Virginia, after the virgin Queen Elizabeth I.

historicEvents.title: Elizabeth I Signs Death Warrant for Mary, Queen of Scots
historicEvents.description: Elizabeth I signed the death warrant for Mary, Queen of Scots, on February 1, 1587, as she was found guilty of plotting to assasinate Elizabeth. Mary, Queen of Scots, was beheaded at Fotheringhay Castle in England on February 8, 1587.
historicEvents.urlTitle: Elizabeth I.org - Mary Queen of Scots

en.lifeSummary: When Lord Sir John Thomas Perrot was born on 11 November 1528, in Haverfordwest, Pembrokeshire, Wales, his father, Thomas Perrot, was 28 and his mother, Lady Mary Anne Berkeley, was 25. He married Anne Cheyne before 1553. They were the parents of at least 3 sons. He died on 3 November 1592, in Tower of London, Middlesex, England, at the age of 63, and was buried in Tower Hamlets, London, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Lord Sir John Thomas Perrot est né le 11 novembre 1528, à Haverfordwest, Pembrokeshire, Galles, son père, Thomas Perrot, avait 28 ans et sa mère, Lady Mary Anne Berkeley, avait 25 ans. Il a épousé Anne Cheyne avant 1553. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils. Il est décédé le 3 novembre 1592, à Tower of London, Middlesex, Angleterre, à l’âge de 63 ans, et a été enterré à Tower Hamlets, Londres, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.Tower Hamlets, London, England: Tower Hamlets, London, England, United Kingdom
de.lifeSummary: Als Lord Sir John Thomas Perrot am 11. November 1528 in Haverfordwest, Pembrokeshire, Wales geboren wurde, war sein Vater Thomas Perrot 28 und seine Mutter Lady Mary Anne Berkeley 25. Er hat vor 1553 Anne Cheyne geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne. Er starb am 3. November 1592 im Alter von 63 Jahren in Tower of London, Middlesex, England und wurde in Tower Hamlets, London, England, United Kingdom begraben.

Lui sposato Anne Cheyne prima del 1553. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli. Morì il 3 novembre 1592, nel Tower of London, Middlesex, England, all'età di 63 anni, e fu sepolto a Tower Hamlets, London, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Lord Sir John Thomas Perrotが1528年11月11日にウェールズペンブロケシュアイアヘイバーフォードウエストで生まれた時，父Thomas Perrotは28歳，母Lady Mary Anne Berkeleyは25歳であった。1553年以前にAnne Cheyneと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子の親であった。彼は1592年11月3日にイギリスミッドレセックストウエル オフ ロンドンで63歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスロンドントウエル ハムレツにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Lord Sir John Thomas Perrot(이)가 1528년 11월 11일 웨일스 p브로케실르 하버퍼드w스트에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Thomas Perrot(은)는 28세였고, 그의 어머니 Lady Mary Anne Berkeley(은)는 25세였다. 그는 1553년 이전 Anne Cheyne(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1592년 11월 3일 영국 미들레세스 타워 프 런던에서 63세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 런던 타워 함레츠에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Lord Sir John Thomas Perrot nasceu em 11 de novembro de 1528, em Haverfordwest, Pembrokeshire, Gales, seu pai, Thomas Perrot, tinha 28 anos e sua mãe, Lady Mary Anne Berkeley, tinha 25 anos. Ele casou-se com Anne Cheyne antes 1553. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos. Ele faleceu em 3 de novembro de 1592, em Tower of London, Middlesex, Inglaterra, com 63 anos, e foi sepultado em Tower Hamlets, London, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Lord Sir John Thomas Perrot родился 11 ноября 1528 г. в местности хавирфордвест, пемброкешир, Уэльс, его отцу по имени Thomas Perrot было 28 лет, а матери, которую звали Lady Mary Anne Berkeley, 25. Он женился на женщине по имени Anne Cheyne перед 1553 г. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына. Он умер 3 ноября 1592 г. в местности тоуир оф лондон, миддлесекс, Англия в возрасте 63 лет и был похоронен в местности тоуир хамлец, Лондон, Англия, Великобритания.
